evals.prompt: Create a new Python project called 'swiss-ip-utils' — a pure library for working with Swiss IP address ranges. Author: Roebi Halter, roebi@example.com. GitHub user: roebi. Minimum Python: 3.11.
evals.expected_output: Full project scaffold: pyproject.toml (hatchling backend, uv, ruff, pytest, mypy), src/swiss_ip_utils/__init__.py, tests/test_swiss_ip_utils.py, .github/workflows/ci.yml and publish.yml, .devcontainer/maintainer/devcontainer.json, .gitignore, README.md with badges, CHANGELOG.md, and LICENSE with CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 text.
expectations: pyproject.toml uses hatchling as build backend
pyproject.toml includes ruff, pytest, mypy in dev optional-dependencies
ci.yml uses astral-sh/setup-uv and runs ruff check, ruff format --check, and pytest
ci.yml typecheck job has continue-on-error: true
publish.yml triggers on v* tags and uses OIDC Trusted Publishing
README.md contains CI badge linking to GitHub Actions

evals.prompt: Bootstrap a new Python CLI tool project called 'roepi' — a modular Swiss Army knife CLI for software developers. CLI command name: 'roepi', entry point: roepi.cli:main. Author: Roebi Halter, roebi@example.com. GitHub: roebi. Python 3.12+.
evals.expected_output: Full project scaffold for a CLI tool: pyproject.toml with [project.scripts] section, src/roepi/cli.py with main() function and argparse, src/roepi/__init__.py, full CI/CD workflows, devcontainer, gitignore, README, CHANGELOG, and CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 LICENSE.
expectations: src/roepi/cli.py is created with a main() function
publish.yml uses pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish with id-token: write permission

evals.prompt: I want to create a Python package. It should work as both an importable library AND a CLI tool. Package name: 'agent-skills', CLI command: 'agent-skills', entry: agent_skills.cli:main. GitHub: roebi. Python 3.11+. Author: Roebi Halter.
evals.expected_output: Scaffold for a 'both' style project — pyproject.toml has both importable package config and [project.scripts], src layout with __init__.py and cli.py, complete CI/CD, devcontainer, and CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license.
expectations: src/agent_skills/__init__.py exists (hyphen converted to underscore for package name)
ci.yml lint job runs ruff check and ruff format --check
User is instructed to configure Trusted Publishing on pypi.org
